name: action-guide
description: Converts a "Steal Our Winners" interview transcript into a structured implementation guide using Problem/Solution/Steps/Benefits/Case Study format.

name: algorithmic-art
description: Generates original code-driven visual art — flow fields, particle systems, geometric patterns — using p5.js with seeded randomness.

name: brainstorming-skill
description: Applies 30+ research-validated prompt patterns across 14 categories to generate structured ideas for any creative or strategic problem.

name: brand-guidelines
description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any artifact that needs Anthropic's visual identity.

name: canvas-design
description: Creates original static visual designs — posters, art, layouts — exported as PNG and PDF using design philosophy principles.

name: CFR Update Checker
description: Checks whether local CFR Education "Regions of the World" files are current with the live website.

name: cfr-voice-OG
description: Rewrites drafts in the original CFR house style: plain declarative sentences, no metaphors, every sentence earns its place.

name: cfr-voice
description: Rewrites content in CFR's Coursera voice — authoritative, balanced, educational — used in the Global Affairs curriculum.

name: challenge-posts
description: Captures Facebook challenge posts from a Google Doc and compiles them into an Obsidian note with images and links.

name: content-creator
description: Produces SEO-optimized marketing content with consistent brand voice using built-in frameworks for blogs, social media, and content calendars.

name: content-research-writer
description: Researches, cites, and iterates on long-form content in real time — covering outlines, hooks, and section-by-section feedback.

name: context-fundamentals
description: Explains what a language model's context window is and what it contains: instructions, tools, history, retrieved docs, and outputs.

name: contract-first
description: Forces bilateral agreement on intent before any output is generated, eliminating one-way broadcast on ambiguous or high-stakes tasks.

name: copy-polish
description: Final-pass skill for persuasive copy — removes AI writing tells and tightens flow without changing the structure or argument.

name: customer-response
description: Drafts copy-paste-ready Strategic Profits customer responses and community announcements, routing to the right specialist agent automatically.

name: daily-briefing
description: Delivers your daily schedule through an upbeat executive assistant persona that makes the day feel manageable.

name: daily-planning
description: Answers natural-language questions about your Google Calendar and ClickUp tasks — schedule, availability, and urgent items.

name: delete-nul-files
description: Deletes Windows reserved-name 'nul' files that trigger "Invalid MS-DOS function" errors using UNC path handling.

name: docx
description: Creates, edits, and analyzes Word documents with support for tracked changes, comments, and formatting preservation.

name: Facebook Automation
description: Automates Facebook Page management — posts, scheduling, video uploads, and Messenger engagement — via Composio.

name: file-organizer
description: Reorganizes files and folders by understanding context, finding duplicates, and suggesting cleaner structures across your machine.

name: fireflies-downloader
description: Bulk-downloads Fireflies AI meeting transcripts, summaries, and action items to Obsidian via GraphQL API.

name: fm-onboarding-update
description: Checks for Force Multiplier onboarding updates and refreshes the FM client report and onboarding sheet.

name: fsoe-argument-refiner
description: Takes an FSOE question, argues the strongest defensible position with real facts, then refines it through debate under pressure.

name: fsoe-devils-advocate
description: Argues the opposing side of any FSOE position using real counterarguments — never fabricates — to force you to defeat legitimate objections.

name: fsoe-exam-prep
description: Builds a complete FSOE Written Test prep package: 80/20 Master Reference, Pocket Card, Knowledge List, Routing Exercise, and Study Plan.

name: fsoe-ia-agreement
description: Builds FSOE IA Pocket Card entries for the 7 key international agreements — UNCLOS, ASEAN Charter, UN Charter, and more.

name: fsoe-lecture-teacher
description: Converts Ateneo-FSOE lecture transcripts into exam-optimized teaching documents using a Dispatcher/Manager agent pattern.

name: fsoe-primer-writer
description: Generates scannable, question-driven exam primers from an FSOE question bank file, organized in topic batches with gatechecks.

name: fsoe-random-question
description: Picks a random FSOE past exam question from a specified topic and starts a timed practice session.

name: fsoe-sparring-partner
description: Reads patterns in your FSOE arguments, identifies gaps, and pushes back with evidence to sharpen your reasoning.

name: fsoe-topic-summary
description: Produces a Why/Goal/How exam summary from any FSOE source material in Ria Santos voice — sharp, sassy, and memorable.

name: fsoe-transcript-cleaner
description: Cleans raw YouTube auto-caption transcripts from Draft.md and saves them as structured FSOE study documents.

name: fsoe-writing-coach
description: Coaches diplomatic essay writing for the Philippine Foreign Service Officer Examination, including drafts, knowledge dumps, and analytical feedback.

name: github-pages
description: Deploys HTML files to GitHub Pages under the personal 7thCaliburn account — not for SP/work deployments.

name: google-drive
description: Browses, searches, and reads files from Google Drive and Google Docs/Sheets via MCP integration.

name: great-leads-check
description: Evaluates any lead against the Great Leads framework, requiring correct identification of what's being sold before scoring.

name: great-leads
description: Applies Masterson and Forde's 6-lead-type framework to choose and write the right lead for any sales message.

name: humanizer
description: Removes AI writing patterns — em dash overuse, filler phrases, passive voice, vague attributions — based on Wikipedia's comprehensive AI-writing guide.

name: image-enhancer
description: Improves image resolution, sharpness, and clarity — especially for screenshots destined for presentations or social media.

name: image-to-markdown
description: Extracts text from images and screenshots using GPU-accelerated DeepSeek OCR-2 and outputs clean markdown.

name: interface-design
description: Designs dashboards, admin panels, and interactive product interfaces — not marketing pages or landing pages.

name: internal-comms
description: Writes internal communications — status reports, leadership updates, incident reports, newsletters — in company-approved formats.

name: lead-research-assistant
description: Identifies high-quality leads by analyzing your business, searching for target companies, and suggesting contact strategies.

name: mcp-builder
description: Guides building well-designed MCP servers in Python (FastMCP) or TypeScript to connect LLMs to external APIs.

name: meeting-insights-analyzer
description: Analyzes meeting transcripts to surface behavioral patterns — conflict avoidance, filler words, missed listening moments — with actionable feedback.

name: launch-mission-control
description: Launches the Morning Mission Control dashboard with your daily schedule, tasks, and priorities in one view.

name: outcome-writer
description: Uses Rich Schefren's outcome-first method to define or rewrite the receiver experience section of any Claude skill.

name: patina
description: Removes AI writing patterns across four languages (Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese) using a plugin-based two-phase pipeline.

name: pdf-edit
description: Extracts text and tables, creates, merges, and splits text-based PDFs — not for scanned documents (use pdf-ocr-to-markdown for those).

name: pdf-ocr-to-markdown
description: Converts PDFs to markdown using 3-tier auto-detection: instant text extraction, fast OCR, or DeepSeek OCR-2 for handwriting and complex layouts.

name: personal-transcript-cleaner-agents
description: Two-Haiku-agent version of the transcript cleaner — one cleans, one verifies — with stronger guardrails against paraphrasing.

name: personal-transcript-cleaner
description: Cleans raw YouTube auto-caption transcripts from Personal/raw/Transcripts/Draft.md and saves them as structured documents.

name: plain-language-rewriter
description: Strips authoritative vagueness from dense study documents and runs a critic agent second pass for voice cleanup.

name: Playwright Browser Automation
description: Automates any browser task with Playwright — form fills, screenshots, login flows, link checks, and responsive design validation.

name: pptx
description: Creates, edits, and analyzes PowerPoint presentations with support for layouts, speaker notes, and content modification.

name: program-library-builder
description: Transforms a zip of Claude skills into a branded, searchable HTML index site and markdown walkthrough for customer-facing program libraries.

name: qa-database
description: Extracts customer questions and answers from community post screenshots and appends them to an Obsidian product QA database.

name: qec-converter
description: Restructures dense reference docs into QEC format — Question/Evidence/Conclusion blocks with elaborative interrogation callouts — for active recall study.

name: scriptwriting-methodology
description: Applies direct response frameworks — DR formula, PAS, AIDA, hook formulas — to video scripts, sponsored content, and conversion copy.

name: session-prep-AI
description: Builds a researched, accuracy-audited CFR-style lesson for the "Learning AI Effectively" course before any teaching begins.

name: skill-creator
description: Creates, edits, and benchmarks Claude skills — including evals, variance analysis, and trigger description optimization.

name: skill-developer
description: Builds Claude Code skills following Anthropic best practices, covering YAML frontmatter, trigger types, hooks, and the 500-line rule.

name: slack-gif-creator
description: Creates animated GIFs sized and optimized for Slack, with constraint validation and animation concept guidance.

name: substack-notes
description: Downloads Substack Notes from any profile's Activity tab to markdown files in Obsidian.

name: substack-ocr
description: Downloads images from Substack posts and converts them to clean markdown using GPU-accelerated DeepSeek OCR-2.

name: substack-posts
description: Downloads Substack long-form posts to Obsidian as markdown — free posts without a cookie, paid content with one.

name: theme-factory
description: Applies one of 10 preset visual themes — colors and fonts — to slides, docs, landing pages, or any HTML artifact.

name: thinking-partner
description: Processes raw material (transcript, article, reaction) to find the connection you missed — not coaching, just sharp thinking.

name: trailer-checker
description: Validates whether a trailer selected the most intriguing clips from an episode — feedback only, no rewriting.

name: trailer-creator
description: Creates short-form video trailers for "Steal Our Winners" podcast episodes using a structured format from transcripts or soundbites.

name: trailer-generator
description: Generates hook-driven short-form video trailers from interview transcripts using direct response copywriting — teases strategy without revealing the solution.

name: transcribe
description: Transcribes audio and video to markdown and SRT using local faster-whisper with GPU acceleration and a pre-run gatecheck.

name: typeui-styles
description: Shows available TypeUI visual styles and loads the chosen one for any HTML or web page build.

name: ui-design-system
description: Generates design tokens, component documentation, and developer handoff materials for building consistent UI design systems.

name: ux-researcher-designer
description: Produces data-driven personas, journey maps, usability testing frameworks, and research synthesis for UX design and validation.

name: video-downloader
description: Downloads videos from YouTube and other platforms in your choice of format and quality for offline use or editing.

name: Vocab Quiz Creator
description: Builds Dark Academia-themed vocabulary quizzes with mixed question types, keyboard shortcuts, and detailed wrong-answer review.

name: webapp-testing
description: Tests local web apps with Playwright — frontend verification, UI debugging, screenshots, and browser log inspection.

name: wiki-audit
description: Audits wiki pages from a batch run and returns structured PASS/FAIL results with failure categories per page.

name: wiki-batch-orchestrator
description: State machine that runs wiki ingest batches, audits output, rolls back bad pages, and stops on systemic failures.

name: wiki-batch-run
description: Executes one wiki ingest batch via batch_run.py and returns the result JSON — called by wiki-batch-orchestrator.

name: wiki-query
description: Queries your personal wiki with natural questions or analysis templates to surface patterns, gaps, and contradictions across your knowledge base.

name: wiki
description: Checks raw/ for unprocessed files and runs the full personal wiki ingestion workflow on confirmation.

name: xlsx
description: Creates, reads, edits, and analyzes spreadsheets with formula support, formatting, and data visualization across xlsx, csv, and related formats.

name: zenithpro-qa-processor
description: Processes ZenithPro Q&A transcripts to refine upcoming lessons and mine Rich's answers, stories, and frameworks for reusable IP.
